title: Registration of Business Names Re-registration: Subsidiary Legislation
title_en: Registration of Business Names Re-registration: Subsidiary Legislation

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Registration of Business Names Re-registration Regulations.

provisions.title: Re-registration of business name
provisions.content:
2. Re-registration of business name
A firm, body corporate or individual shall make an application to the Registrar for re-registration of a business name in Form A set out in Schedule 1 and upon payment of a fee as set out in Schedule 2.

provisions.title: Certificate of registration
provisions.content:
3. Certificate of registration
The Registrar shall, after consideration of application made under regulation 2, issue a certificate of registration in Form B set out in Schedule 1.
